configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: Set up the integration with TheHive and Cortex

entity.label: Account name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of Account name should be between 1 and 50
Account name must start with a letter and followed by alphabetic letters, digits or underscores.

entity.label: Username
entity.help: Enter the username for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of username should be between 1 and 200

entity.label: Password
entity.help: Enter the password for this account.

validators.errorMsg: Length of password should be between 1 and 8192

entity.label: Name
entity.help: A unique name for the instance.

validators.errorMsg: Length of name should be between 1 and 100

entity.label: Account
entity.help: Select the account to use for authentication.

validators.errorMsg: Account name is required.

entity.label: Authentication Type
entity.help: Select the type of authentication to use.

validators.errorMsg: Authentication type is required.

entity.label: Type
entity.help: Select the type of instance.

validators.errorMsg: Type is required.

entity.label: Environment
entity.help: Select the environment of the instance.

validators.errorMsg: Environment is required.

entity.label: Host
entity.help: Instance host (e.g. 127.0.0.1 or thehive.example.com).

validators.errorMsg: Length of host should be between 1 and 255

entity.label: Port
entity.help: Port number (e.g. 9000).

validators.errorMsg: Port must be a number between 1 and 65535

entity.label: URI
entity.help: Base URI of the instance (default is '/').

validators.errorMsg: Length of URI should be between 1 and 255

entity.label: Organisation
entity.help: Organisation name (TheHive only). If not set, the first accessible organisation will be used.

validators.errorMsg: Length of organisation should be between 0 and 100

entity.label: Proxy URL
entity.help: Proxy URL (e.g. proxy.example.com). Set to '-' if not used.

validators.errorMsg: Length of proxy URL should be between 1 and 255

entity.label: Proxy Account
entity.help: Select the account for proxy authentication if required.

entity.label: Client Certificate Path
entity.help: Filename of the client certificate placed in the app's local/ folder. Set to '-' if not used.

validators.errorMsg: Length of client cert path should be between 1 and 255

entity.label: CA Certificate Path
entity.help: Filename of the custom CA certificate bundle (PEM format) placed in the app's local/ folder. Set to '-' to use default Splunk/Python CA bundle.

validators.errorMsg: Length of CA cert path should be between 1 and 255

entity.label: Comment
entity.help: Optional comment for this instance.

validators.errorMsg: Length of comment should be max 255
Must be between 1 and 10000
Must be between 1 and 10000
Must be between 1 and 10000
Must be between 0 and 10
Input Name must begin with a letter and consist exclusively of alphanumeric characters and underscores.
Interval must be a number between 1 and 86400 (1 day)

entity.label: Instance ID
entity.help: Select the instance from the list.

validators.errorMsg: Invalid input.
Max size must be a number between 1 and 1000000
Input Name must begin with a letter and consist exclusively of alphanumeric characters and underscores.
Interval must be -1 for one-shot collection (backfill).

entity.label: Instance ID
entity.help: Select the instance from the list.

entity.label: Backfill: Start date
entity.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS. Example: 2023-01-01 or 2023-01-01T12:00:00.

validators.errorMsg: Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS

entity.label: Backfill: End date
entity.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS. If only a date is provided, it will include the entire day until 23:59:59.

validators.errorMsg: Date format must be YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
Invalid input.
Max size must be a number between 1 and 1000000
Input Name must begin with a letter and consist exclusively of alphanumeric characters and underscores.
Interval must be a number between 1 and 86400 (1 day)

entity.help: Select the instance from the list.

Input Name must begin with a letter and consist exclusively of alphanumeric characters and underscores.
Interval must be -1 for one-shot collection (backfill).
